method.stream_probe: ffprobe with 15-second read timeout and VLC-like user agent
method.playback_probe: 8-second FFmpeg decode; a probe is not accepted without a valid video frame
method.identity_check: sample video frames were checked for channel watermark/identity; interruption pages and wrong logos fail
method.publication_rule: no credential-bearing or token-bearing fallback URL is published

Channel 8.identity_evidence: frame showed Channel 8 Thailand / channel8thailand.com, not Singapore 8频道
Channel 8.official_constraint: page metadata marks Encryption=True and Territory=Singapore (VPN ON)

Channel U.identity_evidence: frame showed 深圳卫视, not Mediacorp U / U频道
Channel U.official_constraint: page metadata marks Encryption=True and Territory=Singapore (VPN ON)

Astro Badminton.identity_evidence: frame showed astro AWANI, not a badminton channel

8TV.probe_evidence: HTTP response was expired.html; prior selected source had measured speed 0.00347x

CNA HD.identity_evidence: frame visibly contained the CNA logo and news ticker

明珠台.probe_evidence: all candidates failed ffprobe; cdn.hklive.tv/cdn.hkyoutv.com also failed DNS

TVB Entertainment News.probe_evidence: all candidates failed ffprobe; vpstv gateway returned HTTP 403

TVB Xing He HD.probe_evidence: playable label-matched candidates showed CCTV-8, CCTV-16, or CCTV-6 frames; not TVB星河

Phoenix Hong Kong.probe_evidence: stream1 candidate showed signal-interrupted page; another candidate showed expired-link QR page; remaining candidates failed ffprobe

EBC Variety.probe_evidence: vpstv candidate returned HTTP 403; alternate source contained a token-bearing URL and was not eligible
